overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a hooded protagonist walking through an ancient Roman-Egyptian city at night. The character traverses open plazas, narrow alleys, and interior courtyards with torch-lit stone architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with marble statue and roman villa facade

events.description: character passes by a woman in blue dress walking in opposite direction
character turns right to follow the building perimeter

agents.ego_description: walking through open plaza toward roman villa, passing by pedestrians

notable_agents.action: woman in blue dress walking toward camera then passing by

entered.detail: tall white marble statue of robed figure on pedestal
two-story stone building with columns and balconies
tall palm tree near building corner
trimmed green hedges along low stone wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a torch-lit open plaza at night, approaching a large marble statue and a grand Roman villa with columns. A woman in a blue dress passes by as the character continues toward the building perimeter.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley between high stone walls leading to interior

events.description: character enters narrow alleyway between high stone walls
character enters doorway into interior courtyard space

agents.ego_description: turning into narrow passage and entering a building through stone doorway

notable_agents.action: child in tunic walking through the narrow passage toward camera

entered.detail: tall white and red painted stone wall forming alley boundary
rectangular doorway with wooden frame leading to interior

segments.scene_description: The character turns into a narrow enclosed alley between stone walls, passing a child NPC, and enters a doorway leading to an interior space. The lighting becomes dimmer as the character moves into the sheltered passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: walled street with decorative lattice work

events.description: character exits building back to exterior street with stone walls
character passes by woman walking along the wall

agents.ego_description: walking along street bordered by high stone walls with decorative lattice

notable_agents.action: woman in dress walking along the wall in opposite direction

entered.detail: white stone wall with decorative lattice pattern on upper section
lit torches mounted on wall brackets illuminating the street

segments.scene_description: Exiting the interior space, the character walks along a cobblestone street lined with high stone walls featuring decorative lattice work. Torch sconces provide warm lighting as the character passes another pedestrian.

scene_state.functional_zone: construction area with scaffolding along stone wall

events.description: character passes wooden scaffolding structure along the wall
character approaches and begins ascending wide stone staircase

agents.ego_description: walking past construction scaffolding toward stairs leading to building entrance

entered.detail: wooden pole and plank construction scaffolding against wall
flaming torches mounted on decorative stone pillars
wide stone staircase leading up to elevated building entrance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a street with construction scaffolding, passing torch-lit stone pillars. The street leads to a wide stone staircase ascending to a building entrance, with the sky showing stars and clouds above.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior courtyard with central fountain and benches

events.description: character ascends stone stairs toward building entrance
character enters building and emerges into interior courtyard with fountain

agents.ego_description: climbing stairs, entering building, and walking into courtyard toward central fountain

entered.detail: large tiered circular stone fountain with water basin
white marble benches flanking the pathway
red fabric awnings over walkway supported by poles
covered passageway with stone floor connecting exterior to courtyard

segments.scene_description: The character climbs the stone stairs and enters a building, emerging into a beautiful interior courtyard featuring a large central fountain. The space is lined with marble benches and red canopies, with warm torchlight illuminating the stone architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a torch-lit Roman-Egyptian city at night, transitioning from open public plazas into narrow corridors and finally into a secluded luxury courtyard. It begins in a wide plaza where the character passes a woman in a blue dress and a grand marble statue before turning away from the villa's columns into a dim, enclosed stone alley. As the character exits a sheltered interior space, the scene shifts to a cobblestone street lined with decorative lattice work and warm torch sconces. The path then leads past construction scaffolding and stone pillars toward a wide staircase under a starry sky, before finally ascending into a lavish interior courtyard centered around a large fountain with marble benches and red canopies.
